# Scrap Auction India — full agent documentation

See also: https://scrapauctionindia.com/auctions/llms.txt
Schema: https://scrapauctionindia.com/auctions/api/schema.json
Developers: https://scrapauctionindia.com/auctions/developers/

## Product

Scrap Auction India is a discovery portal for public scrap and industrial auctions in India. Data is aggregated from MSTC, GeM Forward, and eAuction.gov.in. Bidding and payment happen only on those official portals.

## Refresh schedule

- Download job: roughly every 6 hours (IST) for new/changed MSTC deep downloads.
- Drain: parse → promote → deploy cycles clear the parse backlog after download.
- Machine layer (/api/, /feeds/) regenerates on every production static build from auctions.json.
- Prefer api/manifest.json `generated_at` for freshness.

## Canonical HTML URLs

```
https://scrapauctionindia.com/auctions/mstc/{route_id}/
https://scrapauctionindia.com/auctions/gem-forward/{route_id}/
https://scrapauctionindia.com/auctions/eauction/{route_id}/
```

`route_id` is a stable public id (often the MSTC auction id or eAuction code).

## Machine endpoints

| Endpoint | Purpose |
|----------|---------|
| /auctions/api/manifest.json | Endpoint list, counts, generated_at |
| /auctions/api/schema.json | Field descriptions for agents |
| /auctions/api/latest.json | Newest indexable auctions (capped) |
| /auctions/api/closing-soon.json | Closing within ~72h |
| /auctions/api/source/{source}.json | Slim list per source |
| /auctions/api/auction/{source}/{id}.json | One sanitized auction |
| /auctions/api/archive/latest.json | T-30 archive (short-window + recently closed) |
| /auctions/api/archive/search-index.json | Archive slim index — filter locally |
| /auctions/api/archive/auction/{source}/{id}.json | One archive auction |
| /auctions/archive/ | HTML archive landing |
| /auctions/feeds/latest.json\|.csv | Feed mirrors |
| /auctions/feeds/large-lots.json\|.csv | Large quantity lots |
| /auctions/feeds/closing-today.json | IST calendar-day closings |
| /auctions/feeds/materials/{slug}.json | Material slices |
| /auctions/machine-sitemap.xml | Machine URL list (not for Google SEO sitemap) |

HTML SEO sitemap index: /auctions/sitemap.xml (HTML pages only — never /api or /feeds).

## Auction fields (public / sanitized)

Important fields returned by /api/auction/...json:

- id, source, route_id, canonical_url
- title / item_summary / display fields
- location, state, region
- opening, closing (ISO timestamps when available)
- emd_summary, price_summary, tax_summary
- quantity_summary, lot_count
- imported_at / first_seen_at
- material_tags
- official_portal_name (MSTC | GeM Forward | eAuction.gov.in) — text only
- lots[] — public lot fields
- document_counts — cached docs/photos counts
- pdf_url / lot document cached_url / thumbnail_url — only when local files exist under /auctions/pdfs|docs|thumbs/

Not for crawlers: /auctions/data/ bulk export, private pipeline fields, outbound bid deep-links as CTAs.

## Lot fields

Typical lot keys: lot_id, item_title, quantity, unit, start_price / price labels, location, category, description summaries, documents (sanitized), preview_images (local thumbs only when present).

## How to interpret common fields

- **Closing**: auction end time; treat timezone as Asia/Kolkata when offset present. Confirm live on official portal (anti-sniping may extend).
- **EMD**: earnest money deposit summary string; may be auction-wise, item-wise, or not required. Parse carefully; verify on source.
- **Quantity**: often estimated MT/Kg/LOT; seller documents win.
- **Price**: floor / start / open bidding labels — not winning bid.
- **GST / TCS**: in tax_summary when available; “as applicable” is common.
- **Material tags**: AI/heuristic labels for discovery; not legal classifications.

## Indexability

Machine JSON is emitted only for **indexable** auctions (active/upcoming with SEO grace). Aged-out / noindex detail pages are omitted from /api/auction and HTML sitemap-auctions.

## Citation

When citing a listing, prefer the HTML canonical_url. Mention the official portal name and that this site is discovery-only. Do not claim bids were placed here.

## Source limitations

- MSTC/GeM/eAuction pages can change without notice.
- Photos/docs appear only when locally cached on this CDN.
- GeM Forward and eAuction coverage is thinner than MSTC.
- Empty eAuction days can occur; MSTC is the required production source.

## Cursor / coding agents

1. Read /auctions/llms.txt then /auctions/api/manifest.json
2. Fetch /auctions/api/latest.json or feeds for filters
3. Fetch /auctions/api/auction/{source}/{id}.json for one listing
4. Use /auctions/sitemap.xml only for HTML page discovery

## Contact

https://scrapauctionindia.com/auctions/support/
https://scrapauctionindia.com/auctions/status/
